title: PingHUD
description: Displays your current server ping on-screen with customizable position and style.
body:
**PingHUD is a lightweight and customizable Minecraft mod that shows your current server ping in real-time. You can adjust its position anywhere on the screen, choose between plain text or bracketed [88] style, and toggle it on/off. Minimal performance impact, compatible with other HUD mods, and designed for a clean, simple display.**

# Features:

- Real-time ping display.

- Customizable position: top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right, and more.

- Optional bracketed [88] style display.

- Lightweight and performance-friendly.

- Toggle on/off with a keybind (default: K).

# Installation:

- Install Fabric Loader for your Minecraft version.

- Download the PingHUD .jar file.

- Place the .jar into the mods folder.

- Launch Minecraft with Fabric.
